name: Novelis, Inc.
description: Novelis Inc. is a leading global provider of aluminum rolling and recycling services, headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia. As a subsidiary of Hindalco Industries Limited, the company specializes in producing high-quality aluminum sheet and foil products for diverse industries, including beverage packaging, automotive, aerospace, and consumer electronics. Novelis is recognized as the world's largest recycler of used beverage cans, playing a pivotal role in the circular economy by advancing sustainable aluminum solutions. Through its extensive global manufacturing footprint, the company remains committed to innovation, operational excellence, and reducing its environmental impact across its entire value chain.
